title: asset.resolve response result
description: Result of resolving one logical asset path. A DTO copy of resolution metadata, never a reference into engine live memory.

status.description: Resolution outcome. Mirrors the full AssetResolveStatus set used by the reference engine adapter.

source.description: Where the resolved asset bytes came from, or none on failure.

normalizedLogicalPath.description: Engine-normalized logical path corresponding to the request.

requiresExplicitLog.description: Whether this outcome should be surfaced explicitly in editor logs.

reason.description: Optional human-readable reason for failure or fallback.
